title: [RELEASED] Integration Mapping Release
excerpt: In a recent session, @VladMonday told us that integration mapping is going to be released this week. But still, there is no sign of such a release. We had plans to implement that for the app challenge but it looks far fr…

posts.author: amaintech (aman sharma)
posts.cookedHtml: In a recent session, @VladMonday told us that integration mapping is going to be released this week. But still, there is no sign of such a release. We had plans to implement that for the app challenge but it looks far from release. Is there any update on that or any early access ? or should we skip it at all.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @amaintech - welcome!

I just checked in with the team, that feature is still being built - but it’s not quite ready for release just yet. We’ll keep you updated as we have more news on this.

Let me know if we can help with anything else!

-Daniel

posts.author: jillian (Jillian)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @amaintech, which integration would you be looking to map? monday.com with which other tool?
